description:
Retrieves a value from the [[HashMap]] for the given 'key', executes given 'code' if key was not found and returns result.
Additionally sets key to the code result value if ''set'' is true.
examples: <sqf>_hashmap getOrDefaultCall [123, { systemChat "The key 123 does not exist and will be created and assigned 345"; 345 }, true];</sqf>
name: getOrDefaultCall

Item.desc: code to execute if the key does not exist
Item.name: code

Item.desc: if [[true]] and value does not exist in the provided hash map, the result of the ''code'' execution is added to the hash map
Item.name: set
